problem id: 7e527a97
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR NOT SHL(6)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  01011000 -> 00000010
  00111100 -> 00000001
  10010101 -> 00000100
  01111110 -> 10000011
  01101001 -> 01000011
  10101100 -> 00000101
  01011101 -> 01000010
  11111110 -> 10000111
  10111111 -> 11000101
  01111101 -> 01000011

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 00000110
